title: Show Your Identity
description: Show your support for the LGBTQ+ community and present your identity by displaying your pronouns and a pride flag next to your name.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/p6HnjKT.png)
Express yourself in whatever way you want!






Tell players your Pronouns
by selecting one of the presets or using your own!



Show how proud you are
You can display up to 2 pride flags from a big selection!
The flag position can be changed too.


Players will also be able to see your flags



Important!
Some players might act in bad faith, so SYI comes with a "Slur Filter"

By default a list of over 500 words are banned from being used. These include homophobic and transphobic slurs as well as words from hateful ideology like fascism. Feel free to add your own words to create safe spaces either by using the /syi command or by manually adding words to the list.

The file can be found in your .../config/ directory with the name slurs_filter.txt
The data is generated from the github repository sawdev1/better-profane-words if no file is found.



Player Commands (Anyone can use these)

Get a player's pronouns
/syi pronouns get <player>

Set your own pronouns
/syi pronouns set <pronouns>

Set your own pride flags
/syi flag set <primary|secondary> <flag>

Reset your own pride flags
/syi flag reset <primary|secondary>

Position your pride flags
/syi flag position <player_name|pronouns>

Get an short description of the flag and identity/orientation
/syi flag info <flag>


Admin Commands (OPs can use these)

Reset a player's Identity Data
/syi reset player <player>

Reset a everyone's Identity Data
/syi reset all

Add a word you don't want people to set as their pronouns (mainly slurs)
/syi slur_filter add <word>

Reload the slur filter file
/syi slur_filter reload


Supported Languages
